feature_honesty.notes: All AI features use real APIs: KlingService for video generation, GeminiService for classification, R2Service for storage, SupabaseService for backend. No fake/mock data found.

ai_implementation.notes: Kling 2.6 motion control, Gemini Flash classification, all via backend edge functions. API keys not hardcoded.

monetization.notes: RevenueCat fully integrated with yearly ($99.99) and weekly ($9.99) plans. Exit popup present. Restore purchases working.

design_quality.notes: DesignTokens.swift used across 27 view files. Consistent colors, spacing, radii. One accent color throughout.

ui_test_results.notes: Paywall renders correctly. Onboarding skipped (device in post-onboarding state). 1/1 paywall test passed.

security_audit.notes: Clean audit: 0 critical, 0 high, 2 info findings. No exposed keys. All secrets via backend.

crash_risk.notes: 5 force unwraps found in SupabaseService (URL construction). All use constant baseURL so risk is low. Proper error handling exists.

code_quality.notes: Clean SwiftUI structure with separate Views, Services, Models. No massive files.

warnings: Force unwraps in SupabaseService.swift for URL construction — low risk since using constants, but could use guard let for safety
recommendations: Consider replacing force unwraps on URL(string:) with guard let in SupabaseService.swift for extra safety
